articles.author: Filip Cleeren
articles.title: Winners and losers from F1's chaotic Australian Grand Prix - Motorsport.com
articles.description: Formula 1's new era kicked off with an action-packed weekend full of intrigue, politicking and an on-track product that has divided opinions. But some drivers and teams rose to the challenge of 2026 much more convincingly than others
articles.content:
Winner: Mercedes - Toto's great revenge
Toto Wolff's grin as George Russell and Kimi Antonelli coasted across the finish line said it all. Mercedes is back with a vengeance, and its years in the dol… [+12953 chars]
